dealsPage.title: Hotel Deals

about.title: About Innstate
about.intro: Innstate is a travel deals platform connecting travelers with exclusive hotel offers across the globe.

what.title: What Innstate Is
what.text: Innstate is a discovery platform where travelers can browse hotel deals from destinations around the world and submit simple inquiries to learn more.

offer.title: What We Offer
offer.text: Curated hotel deals, global destination inspiration, and a fast, friendly inquiry process — without the complexity of booking systems.

focus.title: Focus on Travel Deals
focus.text: We focus exclusively on surfacing great hotel offers, not on managing reservations or payments.

global.title: Global Coverage
global.text: From Dubai to Bangkok, our destination network spans every region of the world.

customer.title: Customer-First Approach
customer.text: Every inquiry is handled with care — our goal is to connect you to the right deal, fast.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: Tell us about your trip and we'll get back to you with great offers.
contactPage.success: Your inquiry has been received. We will contact you soon.
